query:
SELECT ds.saleDate, l.name as location, ds.totalSales, ds.netSales, ds.totalTax, ds.orderCount 
FROM dailySales ds 
JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id 
WHERE ds.saleDate BETWEEN '2026-03-10' AND '2026-03-16' 
ORDER BY ds.saleDate, l.name;
